purpose: Checked-in no-cargo contract for scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh. The preflight is allowed to run rch diagnose --dry-run only; it must fail closed on local fallback, missing offload classification, skipped worker selection, critical pressure, or missing admissible workers, and it must make the blocked/admissible report schema stable for other guards. A single leading -- command separator is accepted and normalized before rch diagnose receives the validation command.

preflight_contract.local_fallback_policy: [RCH] local is never accepted as validation proof.

current_blocked_state.operator_action: Generate an approval packet before attempting cargo validation.

negative_controls.mutation: synthetic dry-run output contains remote required refusal, no admissible workers, and no validation proof
synthetic command argv begins with conventional -- separator
synthetic rch diagnose exits nonzero without a recognized failure signature
synthetic rch diagnose exits zero with no failure signatures
validate a synthetic report missing most must_materialize fields
change report_contract.output_path away from the actual emitted report
change report_contract.log_path away from the actual emitted JSONL log
claim current blocked state while omitting one required blocked-state signature
classify an admissible preflight with no failure signatures through the current blocked-state field
synthetic approval readiness row claims cleanup is safe without explicit user approval
synthetic approval packet has a different repo_state.head_commit than current HEAD, so current-ready paths, summaries, and worker aggregates stay empty and action asks for regeneration
synthetic current approval packet omits no_candidate_diagnostics
synthetic current approval packet has no_candidate_diagnostics without candidate_rejection_summary
synthetic current approval packet includes approval_request boundary text

commands: bash -c 'mkdir -p target/rch-remote-admissibility; set +e; RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 bash scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh "cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone" 2> target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.stderr; rc=$?; case "$rc" in 0|2) exit 0 ;; *) exit "$rc" ;; esac'

bash -c 'mkdir -p target/rch-remote-admissibility; set +e; RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 bash scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone 2> target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.leading_separator.stderr; rc=$?; case "$rc" in 0|2) exit 0 ;; *) exit "$rc" ;; esac'

jq -e '.validation_command == "cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone" and (.failure_signatures | index("missing_offload_classification") | not)' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json

jq -e '.proof_disposition.schema_version == "rch_proof_disposition.v1" and .proof_disposition.validation_command == .validation_command and .proof_disposition.remote_required == true and .proof_disposition.required_remote_env == "RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1" and (.proof_disposition.affected_bead_or_contract.bead | type == "string") and ((.status == "admissible" and .proof_disposition.evidence_kind == "validation_proof" and .proof_disposition.counts_as_validation_proof == true and .proof_disposition.counts_as_blocker_evidence == false) or (.status != "admissible" and .proof_disposition.evidence_kind == "blocker_evidence" and .proof_disposition.counts_as_validation_proof == false and .proof_disposition.counts_as_blocker_evidence == true and (.proof_disposition.remote_refusal_reason | type == "string")))' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json

jq -e '.contract_status == "pass" and ((.status == "admissible" and (.failure_signatures | length) == 0 and (.operator_next_action | type == "string") and (.approval_packet_status | type == "string")) or (.status == "blocked" and (.operator_next_action | type == "string") and (.approval_packet_status | type == "string") and (.approval_ready_candidates | type == "number") and (.approval_ready_worker_ids | type == "array") and (.approval_ready_candidate_count_by_worker | type == "object") and ((.approval_ready_candidate_count_by_worker | to_entries | map(.value) | add // 0) == .approval_ready_candidates) and ((.operator_next_action == "request_explicit_cleanup_approval_for_current_ready_paths") or (.approval_packet_status == "stale_for_current_head" and .operator_next_action == "regenerate_approval_packet_for_current_head") or (.approval_packet_status == "not_generated" and .operator_next_action == "generate_approval_packet"))))' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.log.jsonl

jq -e '.contract_status == "pass" and ((.status == "blocked" and .status_on_current_blocked_state == "blocked") or (.status == "admissible" and .status_on_current_blocked_state == "not_current_blocked_state") or (.status == "diagnose_failed" and .status_on_current_blocked_state == "not_current_blocked_state"))' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json

jq -e '(.status == "admissible" and .operator_message == "Remote rch admissibility preflight passed.") or (.status != "admissible" and (.operator_message | contains("operator_next_action=") and contains("Do not run cleanup without explicit written approval")))' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json

jq -e '(.approval_readiness_summary.ready_for_explicit_user_approval_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_for_explicit_user_approval_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.fresh_for_current_head | type == "boolean") and (.approval_readiness_summary.status | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_action | type == "string") and ((.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_command | type) == "string" or (.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_command | type) == "null") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_paths | type == "array") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_summaries | type == "array") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_worker_ids | type == "array") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_count_by_worker | type == "object") and ((.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_count_by_worker | to_entries | map(.value) | add // 0) == .approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_for_explicit_user_approval_count) and all(.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_summaries[]; .read_only_checks_passed == true and .exact_user_approval_required == true and .safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .cleanup_executed == false and (.blocked_by | index("explicit_user_approval_required"))) and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.status | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.diagnostic_summary | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.next_action | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.candidate_rejection_summary | type == "object") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.candidate_rejection_summary.bounded_du_finding_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.candidate_rejection_summary.rejected_finding_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.candidate_rejection_summary.rejection_count_by_reason | type == "object") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.candidate_rejection_summary.largest_rejected_findings | type == "array") and (.approval_readiness_summary.approval_boundary.explicit_user_text_required_before_cleanup | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.approval_boundary.commands_not_executed | type == "array") and .approval_readiness_summary.approval_boundary.safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .approval_readiness_summary.approval_boundary.cleanup_executed == false and .approval_readiness_summary.safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .approval_readiness_summary.cleanup_executed == false' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json

bash -c 'status=$(jq -r .status target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json); if [ "$status" = "admissible" ]; then test -f target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.stderr; else grep -q "operator_next_action=" target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.stderr && grep -q "approval_ready_paths=" target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.stderr; fi'

bash -c 'status=$(jq -r .status target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json); if [ "$status" = "admissible" ]; then test -f target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.leading_separator.stderr; else grep -q "operator_next_action=" target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.leading_separator.stderr && grep -q "approval_ready_paths=" target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.leading_separator.stderr; fi'
validation.cargo_reason: This is a shell/Python dry-run preflight and JSON contract checker. It does not run cargo or compile Rust.
